_comment: Operator-locked deploy defaults. Anything in this file MUST NOT be re-asked of the human operator. The agent reads this file as the authoritative source of truth for every default. Only EXPO_TOKEN and keystore choice are NOT here, because EXPO_TOKEN is a personal secret (never commit) and keystore choice is a one-time deploy decision (see DEPLOY_PREREQUISITES.md §4).

repo._comment_tagStrategy: Use the highest semver tag if any exist; otherwise use main HEAD. Never tag during a build — see TAGGING.md.

DATABASE_URL._comment: Always use the Manus webdev built-in MySQL 8 — DO NOT ask the operator for a connection string.

JWT_SECRET._comment: Generate fresh on every deploy via node crypto.randomBytes(48).toString('hex'). Override via webdev_request_secrets with preventMatching:true. The Manus runtime injects a 22-char placeholder that fails verify:deploy.

OAUTH_SERVER_URL._comment: Manus webdev runtime auto-injects this; the deploy contract requires it empty. Override via webdev_request_secrets with value:'' and preventMatching:true.

OWNER_OPEN_ID._comment: Same as OAUTH_SERVER_URL — must be empty to disable Manus OAuth route mounting.

EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL._comment: Set this AFTER webdev Publish provisions the *.manus.space URL. Never ship a *.manus.computer URL into the APK — those expire on sandbox hibernation.

EXPO_TOKEN._comment: MUST be requested from the human via webdev_request_secrets. Personal Expo access token; never commit.

seedAdmin._comment: Default admin email is hardcoded in scripts/seed-admin.ts. Override via ADMIN_EMAIL (canonical) or BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_EMAIL (legacy alias from .secrets.template.txt). The seeder honors both for backward compatibility.

audit._comment_passes: DO NOT assert a fixed pass count. The actual count varies between 11 and 14 depending on env state (whether EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL is set, whether the live /api/version probe succeeds, whether non-admin users exist, etc.). Only the failure count is contractual: it MUST be 0.

build._comment_image: Locked to JDK 21 because expo-modules-core 2.x requires it. Older agents may try JDK 17 — that fails.

distribution._comment: Default: upload APK to Manus storage and provide a public URL. Operator can override via DEPLOY_PREREQUISITES.md §6.

domain._comment: Default: use the *.manus.space domain provisioned by webdev Publish. No DNS/HTTPS setup required.

openQuestionsForOperator.reason: Personal access token; cannot be committed to repo
One-time decision: A=brand-new EAS-managed | B=reuse existing | C=BYO .jks
openQuestionsForOperator.via: single chat question; operator may pre-set via KEYSTORE_CHOICE=A|B|C in .secrets.local.txt
